title: Star Wars Eclipse cannot be finished without more staff, striking developers warn
summary: Quantic Dream workers say the game is at risk if mass layoffs continue.

title: GTA 6 will not have a physical disc version, not at launch nor months after
summary: Multiple reports confirm that Rockstar does not plan to release a physical edition of Grand Theft Auto 6.

title: Deltarune Chapter 5 is now available and brings mysterious content
summary: The new chapter of Toby Fox's RPG was released on multiple platforms with new areas and unsettling scenes.

title: Sony will remove more than 500 movies purchased on PlayStation Store
summary: Users lose access to previously digitally purchased titles, sparking criticism about digital ownership.

title: Meccha Chameleon sells 10 million copies in 16 days
summary: The indie hide-and-seek game becomes a viral success exceeding all expectations.

title: Lenovo predicts that high RAM prices will be the new normal
summary: The company warns that the RAM price crisis may be irreversible.

title: Bloodwoven: a survival immersive sim set on the frozen corpse of a god
summary: The new game from the director of Blood West combines survival and shooting in an icy and mystical world.

title: Under Night In-Birth II receives major update and new DLC character
summary: The fighting game announces a big update alongside the release of fighter Zohar.

title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising arrives on Switch 2 in September with new DLC
summary: The Switch 2 version of the fighting game will include the character Id as downloadable content.

title: Rivals of Aether II adds Gouie and Mina the Hollower as guest fighters
summary: The platform fighter receives new characters, including Mina the Hollower in 2027.

title: Palworld 1.0 update includes 27 pages of changes
summary: The successful survival game receives its definitive version with numerous new features and adjustments.

title: Surprise updates turn Path of Exile 2 into an ARPG giant
summary: A series of unexpected patches have polished the action RPG, preparing it for its definitive release.

title: Thief Remastered will feature the original developer and a graphic novel
summary: Nightdive Studios works on the remaster with the creator of the original cinematics and expanded content.

title: Helldivers 2 delays its next Warbond and challenges players with a stratagem quiz
summary: Arrowhead Studios postpones the content while the community participates in a game of identifying stratagem codes.

title: Ex Burnout developers create Star Wars: Galactic Racer, a pure racing game
summary: The new title promises to be the purest expression of the racing genre inspired by N64 and PS2 classics.

title: Civilization 7 developers talk about 20th century leaders and colonialism
summary: The team discusses how to address controversial historical figures and colonialism in a 4X strategy game.

title: Several Switch games receive compatibility patches for Switch 2
summary: Nintendo updates multiple titles to ensure proper functioning on the next console.

title: A24's partnership with Google AI sparks controversy among fans
summary: The independent production company faces criticism for its collaboration with artificial intelligence, considered a weak excuse.

title: Fans fear scalpers will ruin the Pokémon 30th anniversary collaboration
summary: Excitement for the special collection is dampened by fear of speculation and resale.

title: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds reinvents Captain Kirk for the better
summary: The series explores a new version of the iconic character, offering deeper characterization.
